raw.objective: “to examine the drug-drug interaction potential of oxcarbazepine and 7 coadministered antiepileptic drugs and to investigate the effect of other covariates on the pharmacokinetics of MHD in pediatric patients”
raw.covariates: Tested: - Included: BSA, CBZ, PHB, PHT on CL; HT on Vd
raw.observations: CL and Vd correlated to BSA and HT respectively, which may make it slightly less practical. Impact of CBZ, PHB and PHT on CL roughly the same, which could be simplified.
raw.structure: 1 compartment with linear absorption and elimination
raw.equations: BSA=exp(-3.751)*((HT*100)**0.422)*(WT**0.515) TVCL=theta1*((BSA/1.3)**theta4)*(theta6**CBZ)*(theta7**PHB)*(theta8**PHT) CL/F=TVCL*exp(eta1) TVV=theta2*((HT/1.45)**theta5) Vd/F=TVV*exp(eta2) Ka=theta3 Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps2)+eps1 HT is height in meters
raw.parameter_values: theta1=2.33 theta2=177 theta3=0.598 theta4=0.902 theta5=3.54 theta6=1.31 theta7=1.33 theta8=1.35 omega1=0.0409 omega2=8.49 covariance omega1/omega2=0.293 sigma1=0.787 sigma2=0.0298

extraction_target.title: Pharmacokinetic drug interactions in children taking oxcarbazepine.

structural_model.description: 1 compartment with linear absorption and elimination

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: BSA=exp(-3.751)*((HT*100)**0.422)*(WT**0.515) TVCL=theta1*((BSA/1.3)**theta4)*(theta6**CBZ)*(theta7**PHB)*(theta8**PHT) CL/F=TVCL*exp(eta1) TVV=theta2*((HT/1.45)**theta5) Vd/F=TVV*exp(eta2) Ka=theta3 Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps2)+eps1 HT is height in meters
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.objective: “to examine the drug-drug interaction potential of oxcarbazepine and 7 coadministered antiepileptic drugs and to investigate the effect of other covariates on the pharmacokinetics of MHD in pediatric patients”

covariates.raw: Tested: - Included: BSA, CBZ, PHB, PHT on CL; HT on Vd

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
